chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 2262 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Application in disposed of case For hearing of CMA No.3856/2025 (151 CPC) 09.12.2025 M/s Muhammad Ali Dayo and Riaz Ali Shaikh, Advocates for the Petitioner/Applicant Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General Sindh >>>>>..<<<<< Learned Additional AG through a statement places on record copy of investigation report of Director Complaints Sindh Health Care Commission. Since the compliance of the order has been made, therefore, the listed Application is disposed of. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
